creator: klimanov625@outlook.com
text: Okay, new development. Apparently no interrupts arrive per default, but if caps lock is toggled on, exactly one arrives. Should there be any buffered keys, they will arrive with consecutive caps lock toggles. Seems like poking the keyboard makes it do stuff. I really feel like it's awaiting some sort of acknowledgement from the interrupt handler, which happens in Linux and NetBSD, but not FreeBSD
